description_long: This is a compact wireless router or modem with a sleek, rectangular body and rounded edges, primarily finished in white with a black accent panel on the top. Three small green indicator lights are aligned on the black panel, suggesting power and connectivity status. A single, tall black antenna extends from the rear, providing wireless signal transmission. The back side features a row of three Ethernet ports and a power input, all recessed into the casing for a streamlined look. The device sits on four short legs, elevating it slightly above the surface for ventilation. Its modern, minimalist design is typical for consumer networking equipment found in homes or small offices.
description: A compact white router or modem with a black antenna, three green indicator lights, and rear Ethernet ports. Its rounded, modern design is both functional and visually streamlined.
description_view_0: Side view showing the black antenna upright and the three green indicator lights on the top panel.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the three green indicator lights and the wide, slightly recessed front panel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the antenna visible at the back and the indicator lights partially visible.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the angled antenna and three Ethernet ports along with a power input.
attribute_port_arrangement: 3 Ethernet ports in a row, 1 power input on the right
